name: Leonard
oneLineVibe: like the nice version of the cop from the Lego movie

publicTasks: Ask if people’s tasks are safe.

dependencies.description: Works alongside Olaf on safety checks and presentation.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being pushed by Olaf to act tougher or pick a side.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Keep the event safe and make good presentations.

notes: Doesn’t care much about people who don’t like him (unless they are part of his secret).
Niceness is partly strategic: he tries to make people drop their guard.

secrets.mildSecret: He is nice to make people drop their guards around him.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: He secretly doesn’t like one random person, but tries to hide it.

rumorBehavior.notes: Talks to a lot of people; rumors tend to spread widely through him.
